creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #1)
As I understand git. I think that's only possible by
deleting everything and starting all over. I'm not
sure why the source naming needs to be an issue? As
you can see, the ports framework already provides
for this, and it's all invisible to the user.
Did this not work for you?

Thanks for all your time!

--Chris
